content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: Pull request opened (PR #285) for reviewing GO annotations for human ABCD3 gene
b. Request type: This is a code review request - user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage
c. Key information:
   - PR adds comprehensive review of 79 GO annotations for ABCD3 (P28288)
   - Focuses on bile acid CoA-ester transport function
   - Integrates recent cryo-EM structural findings
   - 18 files changed with significant additions (10788+, 7720-)
   - Main deliverable is ABCD3-ai-review.yaml file
d. Main tasks:
   - Review the gene annotation review methodology and quality
   - Check YAML schema compliance and data quality
   - Assess scientific accuracy of GO term classifications
   - Evaluate supporting evidence and citations
   - Check for potential issues in the review process
e. Plan:
   - Read key files: ABCD3-ai-review.yaml, notes, and supporting data
   - Validate against schema using `just validate human ABCD3`
   - Review scientific methodology and evidence quality
   - Check for consistency and completeness
   - Provide structured feedback on the review quality
f. Limitations: May need to install dependencies for validation tools
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request focusing on the GO annotation review for human ABCD3. Let me start by examining the key files and validation.

input.body: ### Reviewing GO Annotations for Human ABCD3 I'll review this pull request focusing on: - Code quality and best practices - Potential bugs or issues - Performance considerations - Security concerns - Test coverage #### Todo List: - [ ] Read and analyze the main ABCD3-ai-review.yaml file - [ ] Check YAML schema validation - [ ] Review scientific methodology and evidence quality - [ ] Examine supporting files (notes, publications, data) - [ ] Assess annotation decision consistency - [ ] Check for potential data quality issues - [ ] Provide structured feedback and recommendations [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24842940129)
